github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Follow Conventional Commits as enforced by commitlint.config.cjs. Header max 72 chars. Type lowercase, one of: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, perf, test, build, ci, chore, revert. Scope kebab-case. Subject lowercase, imperative mood, no trailing period. Body wraps at 100 chars with one blank line after subject.
